hooks.command: PY=$(command -v python3 || command -v python); [ -n "$PY" ] && "$PY" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/skills/shrinkage/scripts/codemap.py" refresh --auto 2>/dev/null; grep -qs statusLine .claude/settings.json .claude/settings.local.json "$HOME/.claude/settings.json" 2>/dev/null || echo '[shrinkage] status line NOT configured — the user is missing the live trend bar + plugin-update alerts. Until it is set up, include as the top suggestion in every Next menu: turn on the Shrinkage status line (/srk:onboard, or say "set up the status line" for the one-line settings write).'; true
PY=$(command -v python3 || command -v python); if [ -n "$PY" ]; then exec "$PY" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/guard_staging.py"; fi
